issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderIsName' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if your Leader IS Nami, not if Nami is on board as a Character.
Leader condition requires 'value' field, not 'name'. Should be 'value':'Nami'.
Target specification incomplete. Should include 'maxCount':1 to enforce 'up to 1' limit, and clarify scope as opponent's Characters only.
